increase(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_sum{instance=~"$instance", job="$job", app=~"$app", pod=~"$pod"}[1m]) 
/ 
increase(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_count{instance=~"$instance", job="$job", app=~"$app", pod=~"$pod"}[1m])
